name: @onderling/web-adapter
description: Slice B.2.0 (PLAN-gui-chat-uplift.md) — shared pure-JS helpers that bridge a NavModel (renderWeb output) and a vanilla-JS browser shell. Pulled out of apps/household/web/main.js + apps/tasks-v0/web/dag.html so every renderWeb-driven page can consume one source-of-truth set of helpers (Option a; see PLAN Slice B.2.0). Substrate-layer, no DOM or framework dependency; browser shells import .js files at runtime; tests run in Node via vitest.
